title: RNA isolation and cDNA synthesis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cdjar","text":"This protocol details the isolation of RNA, purification, and subsequent cDNA synthesis for downstream applications such as qPCR. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"ccsm2","text":"Follow institutional guidelines for the disposal of biological and chemical waste.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"e34h3","text":"Cell lysates stored in TRIzol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2om6j","text":"TRIzol (Invitrogen, Cat# 15596026) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9rb2a","text":"GlycoBlue Coprecipitant (2 μL of 15 mg mL−1; Invitrogen, Cat# AM9515)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":41,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1vaa3","text":"DNase I Set (RNase-free)(Zymo Research, Cat# E1010)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4h549","text":"RNA Clean \u0026 Concentrator-5 Kit (Zymo Research, Cat# R1014) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"duqet","text":"qScriptTM cDNA SuperMix (VWR, Cat# 101414-102)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":7,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw cells stored in TRIzol to Room temperature .
Add 200 µL of chloroform to the samples and invert to mix.
Centrifuge the samples at 12000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes .
Carefully collect the aqueous phase (top clear layer) and dispense into a 1.5 ml RNase free eppendorf tube. Be careful not to disturb the interphase!
Add 2 µL GlycoBlue Coprecipitant and 500 µL isopropanol to precipitate the RNA. Incubate for 00:10:00 .
Wash the RNA pellet with 1 mL of 75% ethanol.
Air-dry the RNA pellet for 00:05:00 .
Isolate the RNA using the Zymo Research RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 kit.
Use the qScript cDNA SuperMix for cDNA library preparation.
Add 20 µL of ultra pure water to the 10 µL cDNA reaction. Pipette up and down 10 times to thoroughly mix.
Resuspend cells in 800 µL of TRIzol.
Centrifuge the samples at 12000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Carefully aspirate the TRIzol.
Centrifuge the samples at 7500 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Resuspend the RNA in 40 µL of nuclease-free water.
Add 5 µL of Zymosan DNaseI and 5 µL of DNA digestion buffer to the 40 µL of RNA.
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .
Add 2 volumes ( 100 µL ) RNA binding buffer to each sample and mix.
Add equal volume ( 150 µL ) of 200-proof 100% ethanol and mix.
Transfer sample to column. Centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:00:30 . Discard flowthrough.
Add 400 µL RNA Prep buffer to column and centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:00:30 . Discard flowthrough.
Add 700 µL RNA Wash buffer to column and centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:02:00 . Discard flowthrough.
Transfer column to nuclease-free tube and add 6 µL of UP-water directly to column. Centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:00:30 .
Measure RNA concentration using Nanodrop.
Combine: %s %s
Incubate using the following rxn: 00:05:00 at 25 °C 00:30:00 at 42 °C 00:05:00 at 85 °C
Aliquot your samples into labeled PCR tubes (~10uL per tube).
Store samples at -80 °C until ready for qPCR.
creator: Sarah van Veen
